authority: research only; no registry, paper, shadow, funding, broker, arm, or live authority
candidate_or_family_scope: fixed six-name neutral/high-premium panel from current research rank; completed absolute one-day shock >=2%, hv20/hv60 >=1.20, close within 5% of prior SMA20; next-session entry; five-session underlying range/pin outcome; earlier same-symbol matched controls
capital_basis: structural $2-wing one-lot upper bound before entry credit and closing friction; not an observed or simulated max loss
claim_scope: underlying-only split/dividend-adjusted closes; outcome is five-session path range and terminal pin frequency, not a traded underlying return. No option marks, option costs, four-leg fills, implied-volatility crush, assignment, or managed option PnL were measured. The fixed present-day panel has survivorship/listing bias. Train-only L0 discovery cannot grant L1, a capital seat, or paper eligibility.

common_panel.join: inner join on trading dates; no forward fill

data_provenance.selection_source: research.db run 36 current full-universe rank; neutral/high-premium panel frozen before train outcomes

dominant_failure_mechanism: frozen train gate failed: treated_mean_path_range_below_control, pin_rate_edge_gte_5pct, positive_paired_range_compression_mean, paired_range_compression_bootstrap_lb90_positive
economic_mechanism: temporary liquidity and attention pressure after a completed large move may normalize, causing the following five-session close path to compress and finish nearer its entry than prior same-symbol high-volatility neutral no-shock controls
entry_trigger: next session after a completed bar with absolute one-day return >=2%, hv20/hv60 >=1.20, and close within +/-5% of a fully warmed prior completed SMA20
exit_rule: measured discovery outcome is fixed five-session underlying path range and terminal +/-3% pin; no option exit was simulated
falsifier: chronological train has fewer than 60 pairs or 5 symbols; treated mean path range is not below control; treated pin-rate edge is below five percentage points; paired control-minus-treated range compression mean or one-sided 90% five-pair block-bootstrap lower bound is non-positive; or any chronology/match integrity check fails

greek_exposures.dangerous_unintended: short gamma after a shock, renewed vega expansion, body/pin and early-assignment risk, and four-leg spread friction
greek_exposures.intended: positive theta, short vega, and bounded short gamma through a symmetric credit iron butterfly

horizon_alignment: the five-session range/pin pre-screen is only an approximate mechanism test for a later 21-DTE credit iron butterfly; it does not establish theta/vega capture after four-leg friction
management_rule: untested future option plan only: 40% credit harvest, 70% defined-loss cut, 5-DTE stop, contract-expiration precedence, and no same-bar reentry
mispricing_claim: none yet; the wake tests post-shock range compression before any implied-volatility or option-price claim

population_validity.population_pure_semantics: the frozen ordered panel was evaluated completely without row mixing; this does not mean survivorship-bias-free or generalizable
population_validity.population_type: fixed present-day liquid neutral/high-premium US equity panel

portfolio_overlap_rule: one open risk unit across the correlated mega-cap/semi panel; no concurrent same-cluster entries
regime_hypothesis: completed large move with elevated short-versus-long realized volatility but close still near prior SMA20; stand aside without every condition or after a failed discovery gate
stand_aside_rule: missing trigger, failed train gate, unavailable exact package, one-lot risk above $300, unsupported four-leg friction, scheduled-event uncertainty, or another correlated risk unit open
